role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: In seeking to achieve its investment objective, the Trust will hold bitcoin and will value its Shares daily based on the value of bitcoin as reflected by the index, which is an independently calculated value based on an aggregation of executed trade flow of major bitcoin spot exchanges.
